title: Bailey: BOE Sees Inflation Little Over 3.5% by Year End
title_cn: 贝利：英国央行预计年底通胀率略高于 3.5%
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey said inflation is expected to rise to “a little over 3.5% by the end of the year” as a direct consequence of the conflict in the Middle East. He was speaking during a press conference following the central bank’s decision to keep interest rates on hold with several policymakers saying they might consider future hikes.

title: BOE Holds Rates as Officials Signal Future Hikes
title_cn: 官员暗示未来加息，英国央行维持利率不变
summary: The Bank of England officials voted 8-1 in favor of keeping the benchmark interest rate on hold at 3.75%. Chief Economist Huw Pill was the sole dissenting voice on the panel, but other officials on the Monetary Policy Committee signaled they could join him at upcoming meetings. Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Hits Wartime High; Tech Earnings; ECB, BOE Rate Decisions | Bloomberg Brief 4/30/2026
title_cn: 油价创战时新高；科技收益；欧洲央行、英国央行利率决定|彭博简报 2026 年 4 月 30 日
summary: US equity futures waver and oil fluctuates after hitting a wartime high following a report that President Trump is set to receive a briefing on new military options for action in Iran. Mixed results in tech earnings show Alphabet and Amazon's payoff in AI spending, while Meta lagged behind. Investors await the latest PCE data and rate decisions from the Bank of England and the European Central Bank. Jordan Rochester of Mizuho Bank anticipates more split votes under Kevin Warsh as Chair of the Federal Reserve. Angelo Zino of CFRA discusses tech earnings.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan's 'Final Warning' on Yen as US Rate Gap, Iran Tensions Bite | The Pulse 4/30
title_cn: 美国利率差距和伊朗紧张局势加剧，日本对日元发出“最终警告”脉冲 4/30
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests:
Sören Radde, Point72, Head of European Economic Research; Iain Stealey, JPMorgan Asset Management, Fixed Income International CIO; Nive Bhagat, Capgemini CFO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BlackRock's Rob Goldstein on the Next Megatrends in Finance | Odd Lots
title_cn: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的罗布·戈德斯坦 (Rob Goldstein) 谈金融业的下一个大趋势 |零股
summary: The last few decades have been marked by a number of megatrends in finance including the extraordinary growth of asset managers, the rising importance of technology, and the ascent of private markets. BlackRock, the world's biggest asset manager, is emblematic of all these developments. On this episode, we talk to BlackRock COO Rob Goldstein about the company's early technological history, the development of its famous risk management technology Aladdin, and how BlackRock is navigating being both a user and major provider of AI. We discuss his view of the “SaaSpocalypse,” how BlackRock is thinking about token consumption and compute constraints, as well as the future of private markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alphabet, Amazon Outpace Meta in AI During Earnings Bonanza

On this episode, we talk to BlackRock COO Rob Goldstein about the company’s early technological history, the development of its famous risk management technology Aladdin, and how BlackRock is navigating being bot

title: Jobless Grads Get Lifeline From Tech in Europe’s Youngest State
title_cn: 欧洲最年轻的州失业毕业生从科技中获得生命线
summary: From the rooftop terrace of Kosovo’s innovation center, Shpend Lila pointed out a red-brick building on a recent weekday morning. Originally the headquarters of a local publishing agency, the modernist structure was Pristina’s tallest for decades. Today, it is dwarfed by high-rises housing a growing mix of tech companies — including SPEEEX, a business processing outsource firm on track to become the country’s first unicorn.

title: Anthropic Plan to Expand Mythos Access Is Opposed by White House
title_cn: 扩大神话访问范围的人为计划遭到白宫反对
summary: The White House opposes a plan by Anthropic PBC to expand access to its Mythos AI model, an administration official said Wednesday night.

title: Samsung’s Chip Profit Soars 48-Fold Due to AI Spending Spree
title_cn: 人工智能支出狂潮，三星芯片利润飙升 48 倍
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s semiconductor arm brought in historic profit over the March quarter, beating expectations with a 48-fold jump as AI data center orders delivered hefty margins.

title: Mphasis CEO on Business Strategy, AI Investments
title_cn: Mphasis 首席执行官，负责人工智能投资业务战略
summary: Nitin Rakesh, CEO at Indian IT firm Mphasis, discusses the company's business strategy and its investments in AI. He speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cambricon Shares Jump 14% After Its AI Chip Sales Surge in China
title_cn: 寒武纪AI芯片在中国销量激增，股价大涨14%
summary: Chinese AI chipmaker Cambricon Technologies Corp.’s shares surged 14% in Shanghai, after its first-quarter sales more than doubled thanks to Beijing’s push for self-sufficiency in critical technologies including semiconductors.

title: SoftBank’s $40 Billion Loan for OpenAI Stake Draws More Banks
title_cn: 软银为 OpenAI 股份提供 400 亿美元贷款吸引了更多银行
summary: Banks that recently signed a $40 billion bridge loan with SoftBank Group Corp. for its investment in US tech giant OpenAI have attracted more lenders to the deal in syndication, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Musk Put on Defensive Over His Financial Commitment to OpenAI
title_cn: 马斯克对 OpenAI 的财务承诺进行了辩护
summary: Elon Musk became visibly irritated on the witness stand Wednesday as an attorney for OpenAI questioned whether the billionaire backed off his financial commitment to the startup in its early years.

title: AI-Led Rally in Asia Stocks Masks Deeper Damage from Iran War
title_cn: 人工智能引领的亚洲股市上涨掩盖了伊朗战争造成的更严重损害
summary: Asia’s artificial intelligence-fueled rally is masking signs of strain, with gains in tech names overshadowing the impact of the US-Iran war on the broader market.

title: Samsung, SK Hynix Payouts to Fuel Rate Hikes, Mirae Asset Says
title_cn: Mirae Asset 称三星和 SK 海力士将支付燃料费上涨费用
summary: The extraordinary wealth generated from South Korean chipmakers will drive spending and inflation, spurring the nation’s central bank to raise interest rates at least three times over the coming year, according to Mirae Asset Global Investments.

title: Prediction Markets Are Putting Government to the Test
title_cn: 预测市场正在考验政府
summary: Unusual bets and outright cheating are drawing scrutiny from firms and regulators

title: UK to Fast-Track Terrorism Law After Wave of Antisemetic Attacks
title_cn: 英国将在反犹太主义袭击浪潮后快速制定恐怖主义法
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer pressed law enforcement authorities to crack down on antisemitic violence, after a stabbing in north London raised fresh questions about the government’s attention to the threats to Britain’s Jewish community.

title: Iran’s New Leader Pledges to Guard Nuclear and Missile Tech
title_cn: 伊朗新领导人承诺保护核与导弹技术
summary: Iran’s new supreme leader gave a rare statement on Thursday, vowing not to give up the country’s nuclear or missile technologies and signaling Tehran would keep control of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Macron Taps Ex-Aide Imbert as Chief of Staff After Moulin Exit
title_cn: 离开红磨坊后，马克龙任命前助手伊伯特为幕僚长
summary: President Emmanuel Macron appointed his ambassador to Australia as his new chief of staff, replacing Emmanuel Moulin and paving the way for his close ally to be nominated to head the central bank.

title: Why Switzerland Is Weighing a 10 Million Population Cap
title_cn: 为何瑞士设定人口上限为 1000 万
summary: The growing prominence of far-right political parties in Europe is pressuring governments to introduce stricter controls on immigration. Switzerland is set to vote on a proposal that would take things to the next level: capping its population at 10 million.

title: Taiwan Opposition Chief Eyes Trump Meeting After Rare Xi Sitdown
title_cn: 习近平罕见坐下来后，台湾反对党领袖关注特朗普会面
summary: The head of Taiwan’s main opposition party said she has asked to meet with President Donald Trump on a planned trip to the US, casting herself as a leader who could prevent a conflict with China through dialogue with the world’s largest economies.

title: Zelenskiy Says Iran War Leaves Ukraine Hanging for Peace Talks
title_cn: 泽连斯基称伊朗战争使乌克兰和谈悬而未决
summary: Ukraine is in limbo waiting for a resumption of peace talks that might end the war with Russia, with the distraction caused by the conflict in Iran a key obstacle, according to President Volodymyr Zelenskiy.

title: Nigeria Taps Ex-Dangote Exec to Head Oil Regulator After Tension
title_cn: 紧张局势过后，尼日利亚任命前丹格特高管担任石油监管机构负责人
summary: Nigeria’s president named a former Dangote Cement Plc executive as the next head of the nation’s petroleum-products regulator, the third leadership change in four months at the agency that’s clashed with billionaire investor Aliko Dangote.

title: The UAE Spurs the Gulf’s Regional Realignment
title_cn: 阿联酋推动海湾地区的区域调整
summary: Saudi-UAE tensions are reshaping a volatile region.

title: Kansas City Mayor on World Cup, US Politics
title_cn: 堪萨斯城市长谈世界杯和美国政治
summary: The mayor of Kansas City, Missouri, Quinton Lucas says he's trying to ensure that the upcoming World Cup, which is being jointly hosted by the United States, Mexico and Canada, leaves a lasting legacy. Kansas City is hosting six matches, including a quarter-final, and will also be the base for four teams, including both defending champions Argentina and England. On the political front, Lucas ruled out running for Congress for now, and said the Democrats should focus on "affordability and competent governance" in the next election cycle. He spoke with Bloomberg on the sidelines of the Bloomberg CityLab event in Madrid. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why the UAE and Saudi Arabia Have Drifted Apart
title_cn: 阿联酋和沙特阿拉伯为何渐行渐远
summary: Officials in the United Arab Emirates have framed their decision to quit the OPEC group of oil producing nations as an opportunity to respond more nimbly to the energy crisis caused by the Iran war.

title: Magyar Wants Help for Ukraine’s Hungarians Before Backing EU Bid
title_cn: 马扎尔希望在支持欧盟申办之前为乌克兰匈牙利人提供帮助
summary: Incoming Hungarian leader Peter Magyar wants to see more rights granted to his country’s minority group in Ukraine before approving Kyiv’s formal negotiations to join the European Union, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Sheinbaum Approval Hits Lowest Level as Economic Concerns Mount
title_cn: 随着经济担忧加剧，希恩鲍姆的支持率降至最低水平
summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum’s approval rating dipped to its lowest point in April while around half of Mexicans rate the economy as poor, according to a poll published on Thursday.

title: Venezuela Leader’s Approval Falls Amid Economic Gloom
title_cn: 委内瑞拉领导人的支持率因经济低迷而下降
summary: Disapproval of interim President Delcy Rodríguez rose in April as Venezuelans grow increasingly impatient with a bleak economic outlook, underscoring mounting pressure on her government following Nicolás Maduro’s January capture.

title: Chileans Worry More About Inflation Than Violence After Kast Hikes Fuel Prices
title_cn: 卡斯特提高燃油价格后，智利人更担心通货膨胀而不是暴力
summary: Chileans are more concerned about inflation than both security and migration for the first time since at least 2024, according to a new poll that serves as a warning for President José Antonio Kast after he raised fuel costs.

title: Trump Presses Putin on Ukraine, Rebuffs Iran Nuclear Offer
title_cn: 特朗普就乌克兰问题向普京施压，拒绝伊朗核提议
summary: US President Donald Trump said he encouraged Vladimir Putin to conclude his war in Ukraine and rebuffed an offer from his Russian counterpart to help secure Iran’s nuclear material.

title: Trump’s Greenland Envoy Landry to Make First Visit to Nuuk
title_cn: 特朗普的格陵兰特使兰德里将首次访问努克
summary: US special envoy to Greenland Jeff Landry is set to embark on his first trip to the Arctic island next month as tensions between Washington and Copenhagen remain strained.

title: US Naval Blockade Pushes Iran’s Currency to Record Low
title_cn: 美国海军封锁使伊朗货币跌至历史新低
summary: Iran’s currency has fallen in recent days to a fresh record low, in a sign the US’s naval blockade is squeezing the Islamic Republic’s economy.

title: Taiwan Leader’s Last-Minute Plea to Fly Via Europe Was Rejected
title_cn: 台湾领导人最后一刻请求飞经欧洲遭拒绝
summary: Germany and the Czech Republic denied requests for Taiwan President Lai Ching-te to transit through Europe earlier this month, dooming his last-minute effort to circumvent a China-backed blockade of his first diplomatic trip to Africa, people familiar with the matter said.

title: US Eyes Fresh Iran Military Options: Report
title_cn: 美国关注伊朗新的军事选择：报告
summary: US President Donald Trump is set to receive a briefing on new military options for action in Iran, signaling the potential for fresh escalation in the Middle East. US Central Command’s Admiral Brad Cooper will meet Trump on Thursday, according to an Axios report, which cited two unnamed people. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Modi Holds Narrow Edge Over Rivals in Key State, Exit Polls Show
title_cn: 出口民意调查显示，莫迪在关键州以微弱优势领先于竞争对手
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi had a slight edge over his main rival in the key Indian state of West Bengal, exit polls from the closely contested election showed, giving the ruling party the chance to govern the region for the first time ever.

title: Mexican Governor’s Indictment in US Puts Claudia Sheinbaum in a Bind
title_cn: 墨西哥州长在美国的起诉使克劳迪娅·辛鲍姆陷入困境
summary: Less than two years into a presidency rocked by Donald Trump’s unpredictable moves, Mexican leader Claudia Sheinbaum is facing her toughest choice yet in relations with the US.

title: Andy Burnham on Role of Cities, Local Elections, Political Ambitions
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 谈城市的作用、地方选举、政治野心
summary: Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham discusses the role of cities in pushing back against divisive politics, the upcoming UK local elections, and Keir Starmer’s leadership. Burnham spoke to Bloomberg from the 12th Bloomberg CityLab Summit in Madrid. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He Rejects Iran’s Hormuz Offer, Sustains Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普称他拒绝伊朗的霍尔木兹海峡提议并维持封锁
summary: President Donald Trump told Axios he will not lift a naval blockade of Iran’s ports until he secures a deal with Tehran to address the country’s nuclear program, extending a standoff over the Strait of Hormuz that has caused a global energy crisis.

title: DHS Shutdown Nears End as House Approves Republican Budget Plan
title_cn: 众议院批准共和党预算计划，国土安全部关闭接近结束
summary: The record-breaking 74-day shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security is nearing an end after House Speaker Mike Johnson united his fractious Republicans behind a two-part budget plan aimed at fully funding the department.

title: US Seeks Forfeiture of Seized Oil Tankers Linked to Iran
title_cn: 美国寻求没收与伊朗有关的被扣押油轮
summary: The US is seeking forfeiture of two Iran-linked oil tankers seized by naval forces enforcing a blockade against the Islamic Republic, according to a senior administration official.
